# Agents Gateway

> Production FastAPI gateway for AI agents, built on top of Agno. MIT-licensed. Deploy in one click; scale to your own Kubernetes when you outgrow it.

## What it is

Agents Gateway is an open-source service layer on top of [Agno](https://github.com/agno-ai/agno). Agno provides the agent primitives (LLM calls, tools, sessions); the gateway provides the HTTP API, multi-tenancy, persistence, supervisor orchestration, and operational surface. Source: <https://github.com/liberzon/agents-gateway> (MIT). Container image: `ghcr.io/liberzon/agents-gateway:latest` (multi-arch).

## Features

- **Agent management** — Create, configure, version, and serve agents via a REST API. Per-agent prompts, models, toolkits, knowledge.
- **Teams** — Compose agents into teams for coordinated multi-agent workflows. Coordinate or supervisor modes.
- **Supervisor platform** — Job queue, approval flows, containerized workers (Docker & K8s). Production-ready execution.
- **Toolkits** — Pre-built OAuth-managed integrations for Calendar, Email, Contacts, and Drive — Google & Microsoft. Confirmation-based workflow with auto-refresh.
- **Prompts service** — Versioned prompt templates with pluggable storage (PostgreSQL or external prompts service). Set via `PROMPT_STORAGE_BACKEND`.
- **Knowledge base** — Per-tenant document indexing on Qdrant. Tag and retrieve at agent or team scope.
- **Observability** — Pluggable OpenTelemetry tracing and logging. `console`, `otlp`, `sentry`, `logtail`.
- **One-click deploy** — Render, Railway, Koyeb buttons backed by a prebuilt multi-arch image on GHCR. Kubernetes Kustomize manifests included. Cloud manifests for AWS (ECS + CloudFormation), Azure (Container Apps + Bicep), GCP (Cloud Run).

## Quickstart

```sh
git clone https://github.com/liberzon/agents-gateway
cd agents-gateway

# Start PostgreSQL + Qdrant (seeds demo agents automatically)
docker compose up -d

# Set up Python environment
./scripts/dev_setup.sh && source .venv/bin/activate

# Start the API
./scripts/start_server.sh
```

Then chat with the demo agent:

```sh
export GOOGLE_API_KEY="your-gemini-key"

curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/v2/agents/demo-assistant/chat \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"message":"What can you help me with?","user_id":"u1","session_id":"s1","timezone":"UTC","locale":"en","stream":false}'
```

Interactive OpenAPI docs at `http://localhost:8000/docs`.

## API surface

All endpoints under `/v2/*`, authed via `X-API-Key`. Admin endpoints under `/admin/*` via `X-Admin-Secret`. Set `AUTH_DISABLED=true` to bypass for local dev.

| Resource | Endpoint | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| Agents | `GET/POST /v2/agents` | CRUD agents |
| Agent chat | `POST /v2/agents/{id}/chat` | Chat (stream or non-stream) |
| Teams | `GET/POST /v2/teams` | CRUD teams |
| Team run | `POST /v2/teams/{id}/runs` | Execute a team |
| Knowledge | `GET/POST /v2/knowledge/{tenant_id}` | Per-tenant knowledge |
| Tokens | `GET/POST /v2/users/{user_id}/tokens` | OAuth token storage |
| Prompts | `GET/POST /v2/prompts` | Versioned prompts |
| Skills | `GET/POST /v2/skills` | Reusable skills |
| Engines | `GET/POST /v2/engines` | Supervisor engines |
| Targets | `GET/POST /v2/targets` | Supervisor targets |
| Approvals | `GET/POST /v2/approvals` | Pending approval review |

## Deploy

Three one-click providers, all backed by the prebuilt image `ghcr.io/liberzon/agents-gateway:latest`:

- **Render** — `render.yaml` (image-based). Web Service plan: starter (~$7/mo prorated). Free Postgres.
- **Railway** — `railway.toml` + wrapper `Dockerfile`. $5/mo trial credit. Reference variables for Postgres auto-fill.
- **Koyeb** — `koyeb.yaml` (image-based). Nano instance free tier. Requires Koyeb secrets pre-created.

Kubernetes via Kustomize: `gh workflow run deploy-k8s.yml -f project=agents-gateway -f environment=production -f image_tag=latest`. Requires `KUBECONFIG_AGENTS_GATEWAY` secret.

Cloud-specific manifests live in [`agents-gateway/deploy/`](https://github.com/liberzon/agents-gateway/tree/main/deploy): AWS, Azure, GCP, generic Compose & K8s.

Full per-platform smoke-test playbook: <https://github.com/liberzon/agents-gateway-deploy/blob/main/DEPLOY_TEST_PLAN.md>.

## Architecture

Single-process FastAPI service. Stateless by default; state lives in Postgres (agents, teams, sessions, prompts, tokens, queue, knowledge metadata) and Qdrant (knowledge vectors). LLM calls go to the configured provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.) through Agno.

Supervisor workers run as separate containers (Docker or K8s pods), pulling jobs from an in-Postgres queue. Workers can be CPU-only or GPU-backed depending on workload.

## Configuration

| Variable | Required | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `DB_HOST` / `DB_PORT` / `DB_USER` / `DB_PASS` / `DB_DATABASE` | Yes | Postgres connection |
| `ADMIN_SECRET` | Yes (prod) | Admin endpoint auth |
| `GOOGLE_API_KEY` / `OPENAI_API_KEY` / `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | ≥1 | LLM provider |
| `QDRANT_URL` | No | Vector DB for knowledge |
| `PROMPT_STORAGE_BACKEND` | No | `postgres` (default) or `service` |
| `OTEL_TRACING_BACKEND` | No | `console`, `otlp`, `sentry` |
| `OTEL_LOGGING_BACKEND` | No | `console`, `otlp`, `logtail` |
| `WAIT_FOR_DB` | No | `true` to wait for Postgres before starting |
| `AUTH_DISABLED` | No | Dev only |
